summary: Comprehensive testing of Emergent Document Hub - massive rewrite with Google Auth, Admin/Viewer roles, soft delete + trash, threaded comments, public sharing, tools directory, inline search, Mermaid expand, and more. All 30 backend tests PASSED (100%) and all frontend tests PASSED.

issues: React hydration warnings about span elements inside tr/th/td table elements - cosmetic issue from Visual Editing tooling, not affecting functionality

critical_code_review_comments: All features implemented as specified in PRD
Auth system properly separates admin (chethan@emergent.sh) from viewers
Role-based access control working correctly on both backend (403 for unauthorized) and frontend (buttons hidden)
Search with fuzzy matching and snippets working
Mermaid diagrams render correctly with expand functionality
Comments system with threaded replies and upvotes functional
Public sharing generates valid share links accessible without auth
seed_data_creation: Test user sessions created in MongoDB for admin and viewer roles. Database already seeded with 43 categories and 33 documents.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Test sessions are pre-created in MongoDB: admin token = test_admin_session_token, viewer token = test_viewer_session_token. Auth works via cookies OR Authorization: Bearer header. All backend APIs validated. Frontend tested with both admin and viewer cookies.
frontend_tests_passed: Login page shows Google Sign-in button
Dashboard loads with admin cookie, shows Admin badge
Inline search in sidebar (not modal), shows results with snippets
Sidebar shows Tools and Trash links for admin
LLM Proxy Architecture doc visible in LLM Internals category
Test Cases category with sub-categories visible
Tools & Resources card on home page
Mermaid diagrams have expand button, clicking opens fullscreen modal
Document viewer has PDF export, version history, share, comment buttons
Comments section at bottom of document with input, reply, upvote
Admin can see edit/delete buttons; viewer cannot (tested with viewer cookie)
